title: galium bungei var. trachyspermum
intro: Galium bungei var. trachyspermum, also known as Russian bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing swelling and pain, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties that help combat infections. Russian bedstraw can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
